title: Quantum Matrix Operations: Multiplication and Inversion
description: Learn quantum algorithms for matrix arithmetic including quantum matrix multiplication, block-encoding techniques, and quantum matrix inversion beyond HHL.
learningObjectives: Implement block-encoding for matrix representation in quantum circuits
Understand quantum algorithms for matrix-vector multiplication
Analyze quantum matrix inversion techniques beyond HHL
Compare complexities of quantum vs classical matrix operations
Apply quantum singular value transformation for matrix functions
